final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: e-commerce hero banner, JD Digital channel
Primary request: gaming smartphone floating at 45-degree angle with dynamic RGB lighting effects
Scene/backdrop: cyberpunk neon cityscape at night, towering skyscrapers with holographic ads, rain-slicked streets, dense urban sprawl
Subject: sleek gaming smartphone with aggressive angular design, illuminated RGB strips along edges, reflective glass back panel, screen showing game UI
Style/medium: 3D product render with photorealistic materials, cinematic cyberpunk aesthetic
Composition/framing: dynamic 45-degree floating angle, wide hero shot, shallow depth of field with bokeh city lights
Lighting/mood: dramatic neon lighting with cyan and magenta glow, volumetric fog, high contrast, energetic and futuristic mood
Color palette: electric cyan + hot magenta + deep purple + neon orange accents against dark blue night sky
Materials/textures: brushed metal frame, glossy RGB strips, matte glass back, rain droplets, wet asphalt reflections
Constraints: phone must be the clear focal point, RGB lighting must be visible and vibrant, maintain 45-degree angle
Avoid: flat lighting, plastic-looking materials, cluttered composition, washed-out colors, watermark
